title: Bodrum, Muğla — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bodrum, Muğla: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bodrum is a city in Muğla with a population of 175,000. A glamorous Aegean resort town, known for its whitewashed houses, Bodrum Castle, and vibrant nightlife.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
